---
title: "West Bengal SET Geography (Paper-II)"
subtitle: "Previous Year Questions for Practice"
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include pyq/wbset-2025.md >}}

---

## 2024 Paper

{{< include pyq/wbset-2024.md >}}

---

{{< include pyq/wbset-2023.md >}}

---

{{< include pyq/wbset-2022.md >}}

---
